theme_and_archetype.description: A vibrant organic theme for a hyperlocal superapp, radiating latin warmth and energetic community vibes.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style grids for features, 4-col for services, asymmetric cards for modern feel.

navbar.style: Sticky at top, glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-filter: blur(16px), background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85), border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05)).
navbar.logo: Geometric icon (SVG) combining a house + network hexagon/nodes, colored with #00C853 and #FFB400, placed inline next to bold 'BarrioYa' text.
navbar.links: Keep hash links (#checkout, #tracking, #bot-demo, #profile) unchanged. Font weight medium, text color default, hover color primary.

hero.layout: Two columns on desktop, one on mobile. Left: Bold Heading + CTAs. Right: Floating bento cards or abstract graphic.
hero.visuals: Use CSS radial gradients mixing #00C853 and #FFB400 with high blur behind the content. Display images of services in floating rounded cards.
hero.ctas: Primary button: Solid #00C853, text white, hover scales up 1.05 and adds colored_primary shadow. Secondary: Outline with #FFB400.

services_showcase.cards: White background (paper), soft shadow, large clean SVG icons (Phosphor icons). Hover lifts card by -4px and adds primary glow.

featured_commerces.layout: Horizontal scroll on mobile, wrap/grid on desktop.
featured_commerces.cards: Images of local shops with dark gradient overlay at the bottom for text readability. Rounded large.

bot_whatsapp_cta.text: White text. 'Prueba nuestro Bot de WhatsApp'.
bot_whatsapp_cta.button: Background #FFB400, text black, heavy hover scale.

animations.scroll: Vanilla JS IntersectionObserver targeting '.animate-on-scroll'. Base state: opacity 0, transform translateY(30px). In-view: opacity 1, transform translateY(0), transition 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).
animations.hover: Buttons and cards transition transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease.

implementation_instructions.html_structure: Do NOT use React or Bundlers. Provide a single index.html or vanilla HTML/CSS setup. Use CSS variables in :root for colors, spacing, and shadows to maintain consistency.
implementation_instructions.routing: CRITICAL: You must preserve the existing hash routing inside hrefs (e.g. `<a href="#checkout">`, `#tracking`, `#bot-demo`, `#profile`). Do not break these links.
implementation_instructions.javascript: Use Vanilla JavaScript. Implement an `IntersectionObserver` to trigger fade/slide animations for elements with `.animate-on-scroll` class.
implementation_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
